Prompt
U
Oracle Events
OE 1: Search emails with a query related to "Sunbelt" or "invoice" or "INV-2026-0398" (or similar) using search_emails to find the full Sunbelt invoice correspondence thread. Discovery: Hana Kim sent the April invoice email to Raj Greenfield on April 10 (email_email_622650a7a23b) for $4,800, but the attached PDF was Palmetto's nonprofit-rate document. Raj emailed Emeka on ~April 14 (email_email_348cdfd14d56), questioning the $2,400 total and Palmetto header, asking whether MoveOps has a nonprofit discount program. Raj also emailed David Chen separately (email_email_56af437dab99) after not getting a clear answer. Emeka sent a correction to Raj (email_email_b75ff17bfa19) explaining it was a document-send error and that INV-2026-0398 for $4,800 is the correct Sunbelt invoice. Critically, Raj sent an additional follow-up (email_email_60e1b29b3e36, is_read: false) that is still unread, asking for clarification since the PDF still shows Palmetto's header.
OE 2: Search emails with a query related to "Palmetto," or "Carmen," or "INV-2026-0399" (or similar) using search_emails to find the full Palmetto invoice correspondence thread. Discovery: Hana Kim sent the April invoice email to Carmen Delgado-Reyes on April 10 (email_email_9f90308e6a7b) for $2,400, but the attached PDF was Sunbelt's commercial-rate document showing $4,800. Carmen emailed Emeka (email_email_1f8e937790b9), flagging the discrepancy and requesting a corrected invoice in writing for Palmetto's 501(c)(3) audit file ahead of their May 15 audit deadline. Emeka sent a correction to Carmen (email_email_cf05b9a123a0) with an audit-trail explanation confirming INV-2026-0399 for $2,400 at the nonprofit rate. Critically, Carmen sent an additional follow-up (email_email_14c1d70d5b74, is_read: false) that is still unread, saying she cannot route the invoice for payment without a corrected PDF and a written note for their records.
OE 3: Search emails with a query related to "Victoria" or "portfolio pricing" or "pricing exposure" (or similar) using search_emails to discover Victoria Chen-Nakamura's escalation. Discovery: Victoria Chen-Nakamura (Sunbelt COO, victoria.chen-nakamura@sunbeltvp.com) emailed David Chen (email_email_68e6dbbcc583) after Raj forwarded her the incorrect invoice, asking about portfolio-wide pricing for Sunbelt-backed companies. This escalated the invoice swap from a billing correction into a commercial pricing discussion at the executive level.
OE 4: Search emails with a query related to "pricing-exposure" or "Sunbelt Palmetto" or "repeat pricing" (or similar) using search_emails to find David Chen's internal escalation email (email_email_7fe9a06077f6). Discovery: David framed the Sunbelt/Palmetto invoice mix-up as a repeat pricing-exposure incident in the same family as the earlier Terraform reply-all incident. He sent a detailed email to Marcus, Samira, Emeka, and Hana demanding: (1) a factual reconstruction of the incident, (2) an engineering statement on attachment-mismatch safeguards, and (3) a client recovery owner and plan. He CC'd Victoria Chen-Nakamura. This is the "David's note" the prompt references as making the situation sound bigger than Emeka initially thought.
OE 5: Search emails with a query related to "closeout" or "remediation" or "required follow-up" (or similar) using search_emails to find Marcus Thorne's finance closeout requirements email (email_email_d14477a755af). Discovery: Marcus requires: (a) Palmetto must receive a corrected written explanation for audit support tied to their 501(c)(3) vendor-review file before the May 15 deadline, (b) Sunbelt needs a coordinated recovery plan addressing Victoria's portfolio pricing question, (c) engineering must reactivate the attachment-mismatch safeguard ticket, and (d) Hana must maintain a dated internal documentation package of original emails, corrections, and QB invoice references.
OE 6: Search Slack with a query related to "Sunbelt" or "Palmetto" or "invoice" (or similar) using conversations_search_messages, or retrieve the history of channels C002 (#customer-engagement), C005 (#finance), and C003 (#engineering) using conversations_history, to find internal discussions about the invoice swap. Discovery: Marcus flagged the PDF swap as both revenue-leak risk and nonprofit compliance risk in #finance. David asked Emeka in #customer-engagement what was going on with Sunbelt after Raj emailed him. Samira noted in #engineering that the attachment-mismatch safeguard ticket (Invoice email template safety checks - prevent attachment mismatches) from the Terraform incident is still in backlog with no owner. Emeka posted in #customer-engagement that he reconstructed the issue and is sending separate replies to both clients.
OE 7: Search CRM for the Sunbelt Venture Partners company record and related deals using crm_search_companies (name: "Sunbelt Venture Partners") and crm_search_deals to find the account status and deal pipeline. Discovery: Sunbelt has two CRM company records (company_sunbelt and crm_company_541459a0c22f). Emeka is the account manager. Deals include: deal_sunbelt_won ($14,000, 2 relocations, closedWon), deal_sunbelt_repeat ($7,000, repeat relocation, closedWon), and crm_deal_5464b8677e6a ($4,800, April 2026 billing, stage: contractsent). CRM contact Victoria Chen-Nakamura (crm_crmcontact_e70d3f5330e3) was added after the escalation.
OE 8: Search CRM for the Palmetto Community Foundation company record and related deals using crm_search_companies (name: "Palmetto Community Foundation") and crm_search_deals to find the account status. Discovery: Palmetto has company record crm_company_69f1ae00a4b9. Emeka is the account manager. Deals include: deal_palmetto_won ($3,200, 1 nonprofit relocation, closedWon) and crm_deal_7ec892bc6085 ($2,400, April 2026 billing, stage: contractsent). The account is Active with custom nonprofit pricing.
OE 9: Search QuickBooks for Sunbelt and Palmetto invoices using quickbooks_search_invoices (or quickbooks_read_invoice) to verify the correct billing amounts. Discovery: INV-2026-0398 is the Sunbelt invoice for $4,800 (TxnDate: 2026-04-10, DueDate: 2026-05-10, customer: Sunbelt Venture Partners, standard relocation package). INV-2026-0399 is the Palmetto invoice for $2,400 (TxnDate: 2026-04-10, DueDate: 2026-05-10, customer: Palmetto Community Foundation, nonprofit relocation package). Both QuickBooks records are correct - the error was only in the PDF attachments sent via email.
OE 10: Search Linear for Sunbelt/Palmetto-related issues using linear_list_issues (query: "Sunbelt" or "Palmetto" or "invoice attachment") to find open tickets. Discovery: Linear issue #417 (linear_issue_cd35f1ab6130, "Reconstruct Sunbelt/Palmetto invoice attachment exposure and issue corrected documentation", priority: urgent, assigned to Marcus Thorne, due: 2026-04-16) tracks the full incident. Linear issue #287 (linear_issue_644c3b2e75a6, "Rebalance April account coverage for Emeka across Sunbelt, Palmetto, Axiom, and Mosaic") tracks Emeka's overload. Linear issue #187 (linear_issue_6b59cce3afc2, "Invoice email template safety checks - prevent attachment mismatches", state: backlog, assigned to Lena Bjorkstrom) is the dormant engineering safeguard ticket from the Terraform incident that was never completed.
OE 11: Look up contact information for Raj Greenfield, Carmen Delgado-Reyes, Victoria Chen-Nakamura, and David Chen using contacts_search_contacts (query: "Raj Greenfield", "Carmen Delgado-Reyes", "Victoria Chen-Nakamura", "David Chen") to confirm email addresses before sending follow-ups. Discovery: Raj Greenfield - raj.greenfield@sunbeltvp.com (Managing Partner, Sunbelt VP). Carmen Delgado-Reyes - carmen.delgado-reyes@palmettofoundation.org (Executive Director, Palmetto). Victoria Chen-Nakamura - victoria.chen-nakamura@sunbeltvp.com (COO, Sunbelt VP). David Chen - david.chen@moveops.com (Customer Engagement Lead, MoveOps).
OE 12: Send an email (via send_email or reply_to_email) from emeka.diallo@moveops.com to raj.greenfield@sunbeltvp.com, CC david.chen@moveops.com, responding to Raj's unread follow-up. Content should: acknowledge the delay in responding, confirm that INV-2026-0398 for $4,800 is the correct Sunbelt invoice, explain that the wrong PDF was attached due to a batch-send error, offer to provide the correct invoice PDF immediately, and address the pricing question by confirming Sunbelt's rate has not changed and this was not a new pricing program. Should also reference that David Chen is available for any further commercial questions, given Victoria Chen-Nakamura's portfolio pricing inquiry.
OE 13: Send an email (via send_email or reply_to_email) from emeka.diallo@moveops.com to carmen.delgado-reyes@palmettofoundation.org, CC david.chen@moveops.com and marcus.thorne@moveops.com, responding to Carmen's unread follow-up. Content should: apologize for the continued delay, provide the corrected invoice reference (INV-2026-0399 for $2,400 at Palmetto's nonprofit rate), include a written explanation suitable for Palmetto's 501(c)(3) vendor-spend certification and May 15 audit deadline, confirm the corrected PDF is attached or being sent separately by finance, and offer to provide any additional documentation the auditors require.
OE 14: Update CRM deal notes or create a new engagement (via crm_create_engagement) for Sunbelt Venture Partners summarizing the current status: the April invoice PDF swap has been explained to Raj, but Raj's follow-up remains unanswered, Victoria Chen-Nakamura has escalated to David with a portfolio pricing inquiry, David has classified this as a repeat pricing-exposure incident, and a coordinated recovery plan is needed. Notes should reference the relevant invoice numbers (INV-2026-0398), the Victoria escalation, and David's directive.
OE 15: Update CRM deal notes or create a new engagement (via crm_create_engagement) for Palmetto Community Foundation summarizing the current status: the April invoice PDF swap correction was sent to Carmen, but Carmen's follow-up requesting a corrected PDF and written audit documentation is still unanswered (is_read: false), the May 15 audit deadline is approaching, and Marcus requires a formal written explanation for Palmetto's 501(c)(3) records. Notes should reference INV-2026-0399 and the audit timeline.
OE 16: Send an email (via send_email) or post a Slack message (via conversations_add_message in channel C002 #customer-engagement) from emeka.diallo@moveops.com to david.chen@moveops.com, looping David in on the current status of both accounts. Content should summarize: (a) Sunbelt - Raj's follow-up was unread and has now been addressed, Victoria's portfolio pricing question needs a coordinated response, (b) Palmetto - Carmen's follow-up was unread and has now been addressed with audit-ready documentation before the May 15 deadline, (c) both CRM deal records have been updated, and (d) engineering safeguard ticket #187 is still in backlog. This closes the loop that David requested in his escalation email.

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.

OE 1: Search emails with a query related to "Sunbelt" or "invoice" or "INV-2026-0398" (or similar) using search_emails to find the full Sunbelt invoice correspondence thread. Emeka sent a correction to Carmen (email_email_cf05b9a123a0) with an audit-trail explanation confirming INV-2026-0399 for $2,400 at the nonprofit rate. OE 16: Send an email (via send_email) or post a Slack message (via conversations_add_message in channel C002 #customer-engagement) from emeka.diallo@moveops.com to david.chen@moveops.com, looping David in on the current status of both accounts. Content should summarize: (a) Sunbelt - Raj's follow-up was unread and has now been addressed, Victoria's portfolio pricing question needs a coordinated response, (b) Palmetto - Carmen's follow-up was unread and has now been addressed with audit-ready documentation before the May 15 deadline, (c) both CRM deal records have been updated, and (d) engineering safeguard ticket #187 is still in backlog. This closes the loop that David requested in his escalation email.
